name: proxy-troubleshooter
description: Diagnose local proxy, Clash/Mihomo, routing rule, DNS, TUN, and app bypass problems with permissioned local probes and narrow reversible fixes.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose local proxy and routing issues
interface.longDescription: Use local evidence to diagnose proxy clients, routing rules, DNS, TUN, app bypass, geo-redirects, and narrow Clash/Mihomo rule fixes with backup and rollback.
defaultPrompt: Help me diagnose a local proxy problem.
Google works but Gmail does not. Check my proxy setup.
Find out why an app is not using my proxy.
